clauses.statement: After release history is committed, the VitePress deploy step fast-forwards main, installs that commit's dependencies, and invokes docs:deploy.
The versioned repository ignore rules exclude node_modules so dependency installation preserves the clean deploy source.

diagrams.title: Deploy source state
diagrams.mermaid:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> ProjectedMain
  ProjectedMain --> FinalMain: git pull --ff-only
  FinalMain --> DependenciesReady: npm ci
  DependenciesReady --> CleanSource: node_modules ignored
  CleanSource --> Deployed: docs:deploy

diagrams.title: Post-merge documentation deployment
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  A[Commit release history] --> B[Pull final main]
  B --> C[Install final-main dependencies]
  C --> D[Verify clean source]
  D --> E[Deploy VitePress]

diagrams.title: Deployment safety boundaries
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  Main[Trusted origin/main] --> Install[npm ci]
  Lock[Committed package-lock] --> Install
  Install --> Ignored[node_modules ignored]
  Ignored --> Clean[Clean-source gate]
  Clean --> Public[Cloudflare Pages]
